name: gtfish16-auto-align
description: Auto-align columnar data with configurable pre-separator spacing. Enhanced fork adding space before separators for balanced column alignment in CSV and delimited files.

commands.title: GF16 Align: Enable auto align mode
GF16 Align: Disable auto align mode
GF16 Align: Move Cursor to Next Field
GF16 Align: Move Cursor to Previous Field
GF16 Align: Align Selection With Separator

autoAlign.enabled.description: When true, auto formatting is enabled for the file extension

autoAlign.associations.description: Glob patterns to match files that should have auto formatting enabled

autoAlign.delay.description: The delay in milliseconds before auto formatting

autoAlign.extraSpace.description: Automatically add an extra space before and after the separator for readability

autoAlign.dimSeparators.description: Set to true to dim the separators when active

autoAlign.endingSeparator.description: Set to true to include an extra separator at the end of each line.

autoAlign.collapseOnDisable.description: Collapse the fields when disabling auto align

autoAlign.repositionCursor.description: Attempt to position the cursor somewhere sensible after formatting

autoAlign.alignment.description: Which what to align the columns
